poppy_intro.speaker: Inez
poppy_intro.text: You should probably meet everyone in town, but–

poppy_intro_hello.speaker: Poppy
poppy_intro_hello.text: You're talking to me? Oh, um.. Wow.. people don't usually approach me.. um. I'm Poppy! It's nice to meet you..

poppy_intro_player.speaker: Player
poppy_intro_player.text: Its nice to meet you too.

poppy_intro_secret.speaker: Poppy
poppy_intro_secret.text: It is..? You seem nice, so I'm going to let you in on a little secret about this town.

poppy_intro_secret_2.speaker: Poppy
poppy_intro_secret_2.text: Everything started here. The entire Earth spans around this spot, so choosing to come here was really smart on your part.

poppy_intro_edge.speaker: Poppy
poppy_intro_edge.text: If you go too far out, you might fall off the edge.

poppy_intro_rush.speaker: Inez
poppy_intro_rush.text: Sorry Poppy, we're kind of in a rush.

poppy_repeat.speaker: Poppy
poppy_repeat.text: The earth has to be flat, how else would we stay standing on it instead of floating out into space?

poppy_repeat_truth.speaker: Poppy
poppy_repeat_truth.text: Most people here don't want to face the truth, but you're listening to me! I'll keep you up to date on everything I find out. There's something going on in this town.

poppy_day2_time.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day2_time.text: Look, we don't have much time. I think they're on to me.

poppy_day2_names.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day2_names.text: If I say their names, they'll know.

poppy_day2_dig.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day2_dig.text: Pay attention to what you dig up.

poppy_day2_key.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day2_key.text: Those dig sites have evil energy. They hold the key to this town.

poppy_camila5.speaker: Poppy
poppy_camila5.text: They’re not conspiracies, they’re the truth!

poppy_camila6.speaker: Poppy
poppy_camila6.text: I speak the truth! But no one believes-

poppy_camila9.speaker: Poppy
poppy_camila9.text: You have to help me! You- you seek the truth just like I do, right?

choices.text: Yup! They call me [NAME] the truth finder.

poppy_good.speaker: Poppy
poppy_good.text: See Miss Museum Lady! The new archeologist believes me!

poppy_losing_his_mind.speaker: Poppy
poppy_losing_his_mind.text: You have to! The end is nigh, you have to believe me if you want to survive!

poppy_camila_continue2.speaker: Camila
poppy_camila_continue2.text: He likes to come in here spouting all this nonsense...

poppy_camila_continue3.speaker: Camila
poppy_camila_continue3.text: I just wish he’d get the help he needed.

poppy_camila_continue4.speaker: Poppy
poppy_camila_continue4.text: I don’t need help, I need answers!

poppy_camila_continue5.speaker: Camila
poppy_camila_continue5.text: Poppy, you can’t seriously think this town is run by.. What was it you said.. [wave][color=#16C1DE]Time travelers?[/color][/wave]

poppy_camila_continue6.speaker: Poppy
poppy_camila_continue6.text: They’re ruthless killers, the lot of them!

poppy_camila_continue7.speaker: Poppy
poppy_camila_continue7.text: All of them came from the future just to take control of us now! And they’re based right here in this town.

poppy_camila_continue8.speaker: Camila
poppy_camila_continue8.text: Poppy.. You understand that sounds crazy, right?

poppy_camila_continue9.speaker: Poppy
poppy_camila_continue9.text: It’s the truth! They changed the past, and now they want to change the present.

poppy_chat.speaker: Poppy
poppy_chat.text: You have to wear a hat like mine. That’s- that’s the only way to protect your mind. Everyone knows that.

choices.text: What theory were you telling Camila?

poppy_hat.speaker: Poppy
poppy_hat.text: It’s made of tin foil! It blocks all the radio waves that are trying to control me.

poppy_theory.speaker: Poppy
poppy_theory.text: It’s not a theory! I only ever speak the truth.

poppy_theory2.speaker: Poppy
poppy_theory2.text: There are time travelers in our midst. They’ve killed before and they will kill again. We need to watch out.

poppy_day4_woman.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_woman.text: Do you see that woman over there..?

poppy_day4_remember.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_remember.text: Do you remember what I said yesterday?

choices.text: Absolutely. I could never forget information from you.

poppy_day4_truthseeker2.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_truthseeker2.text: I expect nothing less from another truthseeker!

poppy_day4_sky.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_sky.text: Just look at her… always staring at the sky…

choices.text: ...I think she just misses her friend.
She views you as a friend.

poppy_day4_radio.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_radio.text: She’s probably communicating with those above through the radio waves…

poppy_day4_hat.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_hat.text: You might notice she isn’t wearing a hat.

poppy_day4_go.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_go.text: You must speak with her! I can’t, lest she realize I’m onto her.

poppy_day4_excuse2.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_excuse2.text: Nothing but an excuse for her suspicious behavior.

poppy_day4_friend4.speaker: Poppy
poppy_day4_friend4.text: Surely she keeps talking to me because she realizes I’m onto the truth and she has to report to her superiors. Not…
